title: ASR Outdoor 10" Inch Green Riffled Gold Panning Pan for Mining Prospecting
description:
An essential piece of gold prospecting equipment is this traditional gold pan from ASR Outdoor. The 10 inch gold pan with two inch depth, features two riffled traps to catch gold, as the lighter material flows out of the pan; a wide textured bottom makes for efficient separation of remaining black sands, and deep colors (black or green) to highlight and provide contrast against fine gold flakes or small gold nuggets. The 10 inch traditional gold pan is notably made from heavy duty, high impact flexible plastic, that will hold up to years of gold prospecting. The gold pans lightweight (0.2lbs), means arms won't tire as easily or quickly in comparison to using a metal pan

ASR Outdoor 10" Inch Green Riffled Gold Panning Pan for Mining Prospecting

An essential piece of gold prospecting equipment is this traditional gold pan from ASR Outdoor.

Key Features

  • Riffled Traps to Collect Minerals
  • Material: High Impact Flexible Plastic
  • Color: High Contrast Green (Improves Visibility of Fine Gold Flakes)
  • Diameter: 10"
  • Depth: 2"

Product Specifications

  • MPN: gp-10greeen-2
  • UPC: 672976788352
  • Color: Green
  • Size: 10 in

The 10 inch gold pan with two inch depth, features two riffled traps to catch gold, as the lighter material flows out of the pan; a wide textured bottom makes for efficient separation of remaining black sands, and deep colors (black or green) to highlight and provide contrast against fine gold flakes or small gold nuggets.

The 10 inch traditional gold pan is notably made from heavy duty, high impact flexible plastic, that will hold up to years of gold prospecting. The gold pans lightweight (0.2lbs), means arms won't tire as easily or quickly in comparison to using a metal pan. And, in addition to gold panning, gold prospecting or gold mining, the pans can also be used for testing other deposits of heavy minerals too. A great beginner pan to work on technique and to work through deposits in conjunction with dual riffle pans, classifier sieves and other essential gold prospecting equipment.

Include this 10 inch pan in your arsenal of gold prospecting equipment to increase your chances of gold recovery; good luck, we hope you strike it rich!
